# AmalanKu
## Aplikasi pencatat amalan harian untuk Muslim

### Pages
- Home: https://amalanku.com/
- Team: https://amalanku.com/docs/team.html
- Privacy Policy: https://amalanku.com/docs/kebijakan-privasi.html

### Description
AmalanKu helps Muslims track daily worship: prayers (5 daily prayers), dhikr, Quran reading, fasting, and charity. 100% offline, data stored only on device.

### Contact
- Email: flagodna.com@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/amalanku/amalanku.github.io
